Katie Maxwell.review_text: She cares about students and wants them to do well
This might have been my favorite class I have ever taken. It was difficult but not impossible.

Katie is one of the best mentors/professors you will ever have. If you have the chance, take her course, you will learn a lot. Show up to class, do all the homework, and it will reward you. Exams are tough, but if you do the practice problems you will be fine. 400A is the hardest class I've taken, Katie made it easier.

Katie Maxwell is one of the best teachers in the Eller college. She is extremely respectful, caring and knowledgeable about her subject. Go to her office hours, do the handouts, and pay attention in class you can easily get an A. I got a B because I bombed an exam and never studied for quizzes, but 10% more effort would've gotten me an easy A.
Greatest instructor ever. Very clear lectures. Katie always cares about students and open to any questions. But you really need to work hard and practice to get an A
Kindness, superb knowledge, excellent interpersonal, with a bonus of a very attractive accounting professor is the sum up for Katie Maxwell.  I wish Eller has more professors like her.

Katie is really the best professor I have ever had. Lectures and OH are always helpful. Always stay current with her recommended End of Chapter HW, which are great practice problems for exams. I wish I could have her in 400B as well.
great teacher will make u work hard for an A

Amazing teacher! Her class is very difficult, but she is one of the best teachers in the accounting department. Go to office hours, they're helpful and a good way to get to know her. Worked hard and learned a lot in her class.

Katie is easily the best professor I've had so far. She truly cares about what she's teaching and makes lectures fun to go to. The class itself contains a wide variety of material, but she is great at explaining the reasoning about topics, making it easier to digest.

Very difficult class, but that's expected of upper division accounting. However, sometimes Katie was unhelpful, rude, condescending, and patronizing in both office hours and during class (when the purpose of teaching to help students). She also dismissed and belittled some students, which speaks of her poor character.

She is a great teacher, great advocate for 1st semester accounting majors at Eller. Is dedicated to see you succeed but she makes you work for it. Do not let non-required homework fool you, if you don't do it you will have trouble on tests.  Go to her office hours, she's super helpful. Be nice to her and she will return the favor.
one of the best accounting teachers very educated and knows what she is teaching i enjoy her class  work hard for an A tho

KATIE !!! is one of the best teachers at Eller, guys please take advantage of this lecture and learn as much as you can in this class, because u wont get as much help in 400B and nobody is like Katie, wish she teaches 400b :(((

Katie is one of the best professors at Eller she will make u love accounting and will do everything to help even on weekends she will come to the UNI for a review before the exam she's just awesome. the material is a little hard but Katie will make u understand it everything in this class is great i hope she teaches 400B
Katie is a great teacher! The quizzes were pretty hard but she drops 2 quizzes and is very helpful with exam reviews. Do the practice problems she recommends and you're golden.

Katie is no joke. If you do what she asks prior to class and make an effort to understand all of the material before class, you'll do well. In-class activities she asks you to complete before class may come up as pop quizzes. Practice all you can, then practice again and again. She is not generous with grading.
Awesome teacher!  Is always there for help and explains the material really well. The class material is hard but she teaches it in a way that is easy to understand and learn.

If you don't have a strong work ethic, you better get one quick (you're going to have to work for your grade). Katie is awesome though. Great teacher,enthusiastic, helpful, and comes to every class with a smile.

Katie is by far the kindest and most caring professor I have ever had. She always goes the extra mile to take care of her students. This course is extremely difficult but Katie's support makes it possible to do well.

Hard class but Katie makes this class worth it. It is evident she cares about her students and their success outside of the classroom. This is a hard class but she makes it enjoyable and engaging. Stay on top of things and follow the schedule and you will be fine! Take advantage of office hours.

Katie is my favorite professor at Eller. She is so loving and caring. She really wants all of her students to succeed not just academically but also as individuals/adults as well. She loves her students like they are her own children.

I did not do very well in this class, although there were many review sessions that I did not attend. Professor Maxwell was very accomodating with extra test time. Show up to class and every review session possible and you can NOT cram for this class. Overall, the material itself was very confusing but, Professor Maxwell was very kind and leniant.

My favorite professor by far! Her love for teaching is clear and is there to help you succeed. The class can be tough at times, but def doable. Take advantage of her office hours! They helped me soo much throughout the semester. Be aware that the amount of time you put into this class is what you will get out of it.
Teaches very well. Helps all the time to make sure you understand concepts!

Katie is amazing! Such a great lecturer and has SO many resources for quizzes and exams. Go to class consistently and put in effort outside of class and you should be fine. NOT a cram class though, so stay on top of everything. She has so much experience and knows what she is talking about. Always willing to help! Wish she taught every ACCT class.

Katie is a very good teacher. She truly cares for all of her students. Although the class is hard she does a very good job to help those who are struggling. I would recommend paying lots of attention during her lectures as a lot of what she says relates to what is on her exams and quizzes.

Katie is an awesome professor who explains accounting wonderfully. Accounting is very hard and she makes it easier. I have never had a teacher offer as many resources as she did. I always had additional problems and learning sessions. Her class is fun to be in and I wish she taught every accounting course!
Best professor I've had at UofA. Accounting is a tough class, but she makes sure that every question is answered and is very kind. One of the best personalities on campus.

I have no idea why she has bad reviews. She breaks down the content in a way that makes sense. Accounting is very difficult, and any new subject covered within accounting seems impossible to learn at first. She made it possible with time and practice. She provides tons of practice worksheets and goes through them step by step. I'd take her again!
Katie is AMAZING, the best accounting teacher I have ever had! If you have an option to take a class with her as the instructor then DO IT!

By far my favorite teacher I have had at the university. Definitely a hard course put she provides every resource you need to be successful. Lots of office hours, practice materials, and content videos. As long as you go to class and take advantage of resources you will do well.

Dr. Maxwell is super sweet and caring as a person but the course itself is definitely a weed out class. Most of the material is unnecessarily hard and you have to pass with a C or better to move onto the next accounting course sequence. The course is really test-heavy and theres not a lot of room for extra credit.

While Katie is a very nice person by nature, the class itself is extremely overcomplicated which makes it too overwhelming. The online format didn't help with this either. Very tough grader and not great at providing opportunities to make up for lost points. Choose another teacher if you can.

Katie is so cute. She is so sweet and caring AND she is a great teacher. Compared to other teachers, I think that she somewhat accidentally over complicates things, but she still rocks. Make sure you stay on top of the content because it definitely catches up with you!

Lots of how-to information is learned in this class. She walks you through all aspects of the problems, but you will have to put in the time. This content is beyond challenging, but there's no one I'd rather struggle as hard with than her. She is one of the best professors I've ever had, even though this class is the hardest I've ever had.

Katie is one of the most caring professors I have ever had, definitely gives off a "mom" vibe! Her class is likely the first upper division accounting course you will take at UofA, but she is so approachable that the more difficult content is doable. Thanks Katie!
Her class are clear

Katie is the best professor you will find at UA. She cares so much about her students' success. There are a lot of clickers before classes and the book is only used for practice problems that aren't graded. Make sure you go to class and the optional review sessions every week.

Lots of how-to information is learned in this class. She walks you through all aspects of the problems; but you will have to put the time in doing all the ungraded homework assignments on time to make sure you understand it.

Katie is the best professor I have ever had. Her class is very difficult content wise but she makes it very easy to understand. Office hours are super helpful and she is just a very caring person. She really wants all of her students to succeed in and out of her class. Would take her as a professor again in a heartbeat

Katie is easily the best teacher I've had through U of A.  Ironic because I didn't actually pass the class BUT she is the sh*t.  I wish all my teachers were as understanding as Katie.  If you have the opportunity to meet this women, do so.

NOT a cram class though, so stay on top of everything. She has so much experience and knows what she is talking about. Always willing to help! Wish she taught every ACCT class.

Best professor I've had at UofA. Accounting is a tough class, but she makes sure that every question is answered and is very kind. One of the best personalities on campus.

She provides tons of practice worksheets and goes through them step by step. I'd take her again!
Katie is AMAZING, the best accounting teacher I have ever had! If you have an option to take a class with her as the instructor then DO IT!

By far my favorite teacher I have had at the university. Definitely a hard course put she provides every resource you need to be successful. Lots of office hours, practice materials, and content videos. As long as you go to class and take advantage of resources you will do well.

Dr. Maxwell is super sweet and caring as a person but the course itself is definitely a weed out class. Most of the material is unnecessarily hard and you have to pass with a C or better to move onto the next accounting course sequence. The course is really test-heavy and theres not a lot of room for extra credit.

While Katie is a very nice person by nature, the class itself is extremely overcomplicated which makes it too overwhelming. The online format didn't help with this either. Very tough grader and not great at providing opportunities to make up for lost points. Choose another teacher if you can.

Katie is so cute. She is so sweet and caring AND she is a great teacher. Compared to other teachers, I think that she somewhat accidentally over complicates things, but she still rocks. Make sure you stay on top of the content because it definitely catches up with you!

Lots of how-to information is learned in this class. She walks you through all aspects of the problems, but you will have to put in the time. She is one of the best professors I've ever had, even though this class is the hardest I've ever had.
